The test should verify the vertical blinker [(0,0),(0,1),(0,2)] oscillates to horizontal [(-1,1),(0,1),(1,1)].
Use order-independent comparison:
```
const sortKey = (c) => `${c[0]},${c[1]}`;
expect(result.map(sortKey).sort()).toEqual([[-1,1],[0,1],[1,1]].map(sortKey).sort());
```

This test exercises negative coordinates / infinite grid support.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Green after completion.
You MUST output the full Step 7 block verbatim (both Compilation
Prediction and Runtime Prediction lines, each with Correct or
Incorrect). Do not abbreviate. Do not collapse the two prediction
lines into one.
